s1.title: Time range
s1.desc: Switch between last 24h / 7d / 30d. Every metric and chart below updates accordingly.

s2.title: Core metrics
s2.desc: Six compact cells: requests, errors (with rate), tokens, cache hit, latency P50 (hover for P95/P99), enabled providers with health tags. Errors-by-code tags appear at the bottom when there are failures.

s3.title: Token usage trend
s3.desc: Multi-series line chart broken down by model. Toggle between hourly and daily buckets; click any legend entry to hide that series.

s4.title: Recent 10 requests
s4.desc: Click any row to jump straight to the Logs page with that entry auto-expanded — fastest path to inspecting a recent request.

s1.title: Current state
s1.desc: Shows whose auth.json / config.toml is currently live (mimo2codex / external / missing) plus the runtime override. First place to check 'which provider am I actually on'.

s2.title: Prerequisites / snippets
s2.desc: Expand on first-time setup: pick a provider and we generate copy-pasteable auth.json / config.toml / cc-switch snippets.

s3.title: Three tabs
s3.desc: Targets: pick a provider × model to write files or set as runtime override. Thinking & Override: global thinking switch + current override clear. Backups: history of every file-write with one-click restore.

s4.title: Test all
s4.desc: Concurrently probes every provider's default model that has an API key — see in seconds which link is live and how slow each is.

s1.title: Add provider
s1.desc: Supports any OpenAI / Responses compatible upstream. Preset buttons apply SenseNova / MiniMax / Kimi recommended sanitizer combos in one click — no need to flip 11 switches by hand.

s2.title: Edit raw JSON
s2.desc: Power-user path: edit providers.json verbatim. Validation surfaces inline with a specific parse error; the OK button stays disabled until JSON is valid.

s3.title: Provider list
s3.desc: Hit the edit button on any row to change baseUrl / envKey / model list / sanitizer switches. Saving auto-reloads the registry.

s1.title: Switch built-in provider
s1.desc: This page only manages the model catalog for the two built-in providers (mimo / deepseek). Generic providers maintain their models inline in the Providers form.

s2.title: Model list
s2.desc: Built-in rows are read-only. Custom rows let you inline-edit the 'Deprecated after' date via DatePicker — useful for flagging legacy variants.

s3.title: Add a custom model
s3.desc: Type an upstream_id and display name at the bottom of the card. Handy when a vendor ships a new model id we haven't seeded into the builtin list yet.

s1.title: Server-side filtering
s1.desc: Provider dropdown is dynamically loaded; model is a LIKE substring search; status filter slices by 2xx / 4xx+. All filters run server-side so pagination stays correct.

s2.title: Export / cleanup
s2.desc: Export CSV dumps the currently-filtered page. Clear-old shows the computed cutoff date so you can confirm the range before deleting.

s3.title: Row detail
s3.desc: Expand any row to see the Structured view by default: parsed messages / tools / completion + token summary. Toggle to Raw JSON to inspect the full body.
